audit_items.proof_trace: The callback at L449 is invoked with a direct external call — no try/catch wrapper exists anywhere in bid(). A revert from auctionCallback propagates unconditionally through bid(), and EVM atomicity rolls back all prior state changes (safeTransfer at L444, s_entered=true at L418). No storage mutations to auction state (s_auctionStarts, s_assetParams) occur before the callback, so partial settlement is impossible.
